-- 3 of 13 --

LAST FRIDAY’S SUGGESTION
Subject Line: A transparent confession re: 	feeling fat and bloated
When I experience 	gaining weight, I hate it just as much as anyone.
You dream to 	be able to trim down, set a weight loss or body-shaping goal and stick with it, or even regain
your high school body...
...however, at best, these dreams 	are 	short-lived.
It’s almost impossible for anyone around you to understand how you feel.
You try to think about the last time you had any long-term results. But nothing comes to mind.
So look, if any of the following 	describe what you're going through...
• feeling your clothes get tighter and more uncomfortable...
• seeing your friends eat the foods they love while you feel like you’re starving... or:
• suffering from energy decline, especially in the late afternoon...
...you may have what I call 	“Metabolic Adaptation.”
Empathy Primary Complaint
Empathy
secondary
complaints
Today’s Lesson: The Primary Cause
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

FIRST…MISTAKEN BELIEFS
‣ Tips, tactics or strategies (or products) your prospect has probably
tried but let them down.
‣ 	Yet another reason to 	know thy avatar.
‣ Very simple empathy-building tactic:
‣ “You probably tried ______, and 	I’ll bet it let you down.” 	(Notice
I didn’t say, “I bet you failed.”)
‣ 	The 	Samurai move 	is to 	brand the belief.
‣ Focus on words like “Myth”, “Lie”, “Hoax”, “Deception”, etc. when
branding your mistaken beliefs (thesaurus.com is your friend.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

EXAMPLES OF MISTAKEN BELIEFS
‣ Example mistake beliefs and branding:
‣ 	“You have to slave away doing hours of cardio to burn fat.”
The Fat-Storing Zone
‣ “You have to have a large email list to make money.”
List Envy
‣ “You have to be really good-looking to meet beautiful women.”
The Truth (just kidding)
The Looker Lie
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

EXAMPLES OF HOW TO USE
‣ “Did you buy into 	Branded Belief? 	(I did…)”
‣ 	“Branded Belief”…you should be ANGRY over this!”
‣ “This trips up more (avatars) than anything…I call it “Branded
Belief.”
‣ The more you have, the better.
‣ 	Endless emails, blog posts, campaigns, etc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 13 --

WHO IS TO BLAME??
‣ People will take responsibility 	slowly 	and only after you have
earned their trust.
‣ 	That’s why it’s vital to create 	an enemy.
‣ The enemy is the source of the propaganda they’ve bought into…
lies that have 	held them back from success.
‣ Common sources: the media, mainstream magazines, so-called
“experts”, doctors, TV shows, etc.
‣ 	This is borderline 	conspiracy theory 	(just without the over-the-top
conspiracy. These are legitimate sources of BAD IDEAS.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

AND THAT LEADS TO “PRIMARY CAUSE”
‣ The Primary Cause is 	the real cause of your prospect’s
problem.
‣ 	It’s always something 	outside themselves 	but something 	they
can control or manage.
‣ This is one of the two most 	vital branding terms 	you’ll ever use
as a copywriter, as it will set you apart – because only you take
about it, and only you have the answer for it.
‣ You will 	bundle 	up the “reality” behind the cause of the prospect’s
problem into 	one idea 	that your prospect can grasp.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 13 --

EXAMPLE OF BUILDING A PRIMARY CAUSE
‣ Primary Complaint: 	weight gain
Actual Causes: excess calories, inactivity, elevated insulin
‣ 	“Bundled” Cause: metabolic disorder
‣ Primary Cause: 	Metabolic Adaptation
‣ Description:
Certain genes in your body trigger your brain to crave food and go
into hibernation mode. This causes your metabolism to adapt to a
slower rate, 	which means you can’t burn fat. A simple fix I’ll reveal
in a moment tricks these ‘fat genes’ and shuts down Metabolic
Adaptation.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 13 --

USES ARE A-PLENTY!
‣ SO many uses for a Primary Cause…
‣ 	“…something experts/doctors/reseachers/those in the know refer to
as 	Primary Cause.”
‣ “Could the REAL cause of your _____ be “Primary Cause?”
‣ “[Primary Cause] Mystery ______ cause discovered”
‣ 	“There’s only one system on earth designed to combat 	Primary
Cause 	from the ground-up… (Your Offer Here).”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
